200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, replicates the ally that deals the greatest damage for 7 sec. The replica is immune to stun, fear, and mind control. Cannot be used on summoned creatures. Replica health and damage reduced by 30%.

description 4/6

Once in a while, replicates the ally that deals the greatest damage for 7 sec. The replica is immune to stun, fear, and mind control. Cannot be used on summoned creatures. Replica health and damage reduced by 25%. By replicating an ally, the unit also replicates their artifact’s ability and uses it instantly. Attacks have a 80% chance of dealing an extra 25000 pure damage that ignores enemy invulnerability. Also, silences the target for 1,6 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, replicates the ally that deals the greatest damage for 7 sec. The replica is immune to stun, fear, and mind control. Cannot be used on summoned creatures. Replica health and damage reduced by 15%. The replica takes an extra 50% of the damage taken by the replicated ally, thus increasing their survivability. By replicating an ally, the unit also replicates their artifact’s ability and uses it instantly. Attacks have a 80% chance of dealing an extra 37000 pure damage that ignores enemy invulnerability. Also, silences the target for 1,8 sec. Once in a while, uses a random ability from The Illusionist set : -lce Dragon: Deals 19000 damage to all enemies and freezes up to 3 enemies for 2 sec. -Storm Cloud: Lightning bolts hit up to 5 enemies. Each lightning bolt deals 19000 damage. -Healing Wave: Restores 25000 health to all allies. -Giant Snowball: Deals 90000 damage to the enemy with the greatest health and stuns them for a short time.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The damage of the replica created by the Illusionist is increased by 10%.

description 4/6

The damage of the replica created by the Illusionist is increased by 10%. The damage of the replica created by the Illusionist is further increased by 25% of the Illusionist’s spell power.

description 6/6

The damage of the replica created by the Illusionist is increased by 10%. The damage of the replica created by the Illusionist is further increased by 25% of the Illusionist’s spell power. A lightning strike from the Illusionnist’s Storm Cloud electrifies the target. Every time the electrified unit uses an ability, they are stunned for 1 sec. Lasts for 5 sec. Giant snowball stuns and applies frostbite. Every second the enemy takes physical damage equal to 10% of their max health. Every 2 seconds the enemy has a 30% chance to remove the frostbite. If succcessful, the effect is removed; otherwise, they take physical damage equal to 30% of their max health.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

The health of the replica created by the Illusionist is increased by 25%.

description 4/6

The health of the replica created by the Illusionist is increased by 25%. Once in a while, the Illusionist gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to 50% of the replica’s max health.

description 6/6

The health of the replica created by the Illusionist is increased by 25%. Once in a while, the Illusionist gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to 50% of the replica’s max health. The Illusionist’s Healing Wave also applies a shield to all allies. The shield absorbs 30% damage for 5 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

A replica cannot be affected by negative effects.

description 4/6

A replica cannot be affected by negative effects. The health of the replica created by the Illusionist is further increased by 100% of the Illusionist’s spell power.

description 6/6

A replica cannot be affected by negative effects. The health of the replica created by the Illusionist is further increased by 100% of the Illusionist’s spell power. The Illusionist uses 2 abilities from his set instead of 1.

Evil Eyes
